ddls:
CREATE TABLE "build_metrics" (
  "build_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build record */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Name of the software branch */,
  "arch" TEXT /* Architecture of the build */,
  "success_count" INTEGER /* Number of successful builds */,
  "fail_count" INTEGER /* Number of failed builds */,
  "total_builds" INTEGER /* Total number of builds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the build metric record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the build metric record was last updated */,
  "build_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of builds */,
  "avg_build_time" INTEGER /* Average time taken for a build */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_metrics_arch FOREIGN KEY ("arch") REFERENCES architectures ("arch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_metrics_branch FOREIGN KEY ("branch") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the branch */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the branch */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the branch */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the branch */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the branch */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "architectures" (
  "arch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each architecture */,
  "arch_name" TEXT /* Name of the architecture */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the architecture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the architecture record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the architecture record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "build_details" (
  "build_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build detail */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the build record */,
  "build_date" TEXT /* Date when the build occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the build */,
  "build_log" TEXT /* Log file path for the build */,
  "build_tag" TEXT /* Tag or label for the build */,
  "build_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the build */,
  "started_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the build */,
  "completed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who completed the build */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("build_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_details_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES build_metrics ("build_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "build_failures" (
  "failure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build failure */,
  "build_detail_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the build detail */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message from the build failure */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution or steps taken to resolve the failure */,
  "failure_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the build failure */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the resolution */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the failure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("failure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_failures_build_detail_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_detail_id") REFERENCES build_details ("build_detail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "build_successes" (
  "success_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build success */,
  "build_detail_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the build detail */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the successful build */,
  "success_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the successful build */,
  "released_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who released the build */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("success_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_successes_build_detail_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_detail_id") REFERENCES build_details ("build_detail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the build record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the build record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the build metrics */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the build metrics were accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES build_metrics ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "build_detail_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the build detail */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to be alerted */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_build_detail_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_detail_id") REFERENCES build_details ("build_detail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard view */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the dashboard */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard was viewed */,
  "metrics_viewed" TEXT /* Metrics that were viewed */,
  "viewed_metrics" TEXT /* Specific metrics that were viewed */,
  "view_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the dashboard view */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration activity */,
  "initiator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the collaboration */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the collaboration */,
  "collab_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration activity occurred */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the collaboration activity */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration */,
  "collaboration_status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_initiator_id FOREIGN KEY ("initiator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
